projectGoal: FlowBoard — ASP.NET Core 10 Kanban API with Clean Architecture, JWT, RBAC, SignalR real-time, Redis scale-out, production deploy.

closeout.title: Closeout — finish & harden Sprints 1–5
closeout.description: Council findings + gaps before starting new features. Does not replace Sprint 6–8 roadmap.

sprint6.title: Sprint 6 — Comments + Tags + Email (original plan)
sprint6.description: Feature sprint from Notion roadmap. Start only after closeout phase done.

1.note: Auth — complete; closeout: refresh race fixed (close-10)

2.note: RBAC — complete; closeout: InviteMember enum fixed (close-10), handler tests (close-07)

3.note: Boards/Cards — complete; closeout: MoveCard (close-06), integration gaps (close-09)

4.note: SignalR — complete; closeout: stale groups (close-02), hub tests (close-08), broadcast test (close-09)

5.note: Redis backplane — complete; closeout: compose wiring (close-01), Redis tests (close-08), polish (close-11)

6.note: Comments + Tags + Email — queue phase sprint6

8.note: Deploy + prod hardening (incl. rate limits, Redis AUTH)

tasks.title: Wire Redis connection in docker-compose API service
tasks.doneWhen: api.environment sets ConnectionStrings__Redis=redis:6379; docs match compose backplane behaviour
tasks.notes: Sprint 5 deliverable incomplete in compose stack.

tasks.title: SignalR group lifecycle — evict removed/downgraded members
tasks.doneWhen: Removed/Viewer-downgraded users stop receiving CardMoved; test covers stale-group case
tasks.notes: Sprint 4 security gap — highest real-time IDOR risk.

tasks.title: Domain-event notifications must not fail HTTP after successful commit
tasks.doneWhen: SignalR failure after SaveChanges logs error; client does not get 500 for committed move
tasks.notes: Sprint 3 domain events + Sprint 4 notifier chain.

tasks.title: UnitOfWork — clear domain events only after successful SaveChanges
tasks.doneWhen: Events retained on save failure; cleared after commit; unit tests added

tasks.title: BoardHub — access checks via Application layer (CQRS)
tasks.doneWhen: Hub uses MediatR/guard; no direct IBoardRepository/IWorkspaceRepository in hub

tasks.title: MoveCard hardening — validator, 404 semantics, concurrency
tasks.doneWhen: Guid.Empty rejected; inaccessible list/neighbour → 404; concurrency strategy + test

tasks.title: Unit tests — untested handler authz matrix
tasks.doneWhen: 404 non-member + 403 Viewer on each untested mutation handler; dotnet test green

tasks.title: Tests — Redis config precedence, BoardHub join denial, stable backplane assert
tasks.doneWhen: All Redis config keys tested; outsider JoinBoard denied; backplane test not type-name fragile
tasks.notes: Sprint 4 hub + Sprint 5 Redis test gaps.

tasks.title: Integration tests — soft-deleted cards, CardMoved path, concurrent move smoke
tasks.doneWhen: GetBoard_RespectsSoftDeletedCards; notifier/broadcast path verified; concurrent move documented or tested
tasks.notes: Original Sprint 4 plan included SignalR integration test — partial closeout.

tasks.title: Security — InviteMember enumeration + refresh token rotation race
tasks.doneWhen: Generic 404 on invite; concurrent refresh test + transaction/lock fix

tasks.title: Polish — Redis trim, EventHandlers convention, LeaveBoard docs
tasks.doneWhen: Trim whitespace config; convention documented; minor Redis startup tidy
tasks.notes: Low-severity batch. Prod rate limits → Sprint 8.

tasks.title: Mark Sprints 1–5 fully closed in SPRINT.md + README
tasks.doneWhen: Sprint status shows 1–5 closed (not done-pending-closeout); closeout phase logged; next phase sprint6

tasks.title: Live Council — closeout verification (Sprints 1–5)
tasks.doneWhen: docs/council/closeout-report.md exists; open High/Medium items from sprint-5-report verified fixed or deferred with reason
tasks.notes: Re-verification after close-01…close-11 + close-docs. Agent-runner pushes to GitHub when this council signs off.

members.focus: Verify close-01…close-11 fixed the sprint-5-report items.
Re-check SignalR, auth, IDOR after closeout.

synthesizer.focus: Sign off Sprints 1–5; list any remaining deferrals for Sprint 8.

tasks.title: Comments entity + CRUD API
tasks.doneWhen: Comment entity, migration, Create/Get/Update/Delete handlers with workspace authz; unit tests

tasks.title: Comments real-time push via SignalR
tasks.doneWhen: CommentAdded domain event → hub broadcast to board group

tasks.title: Tags + CardTags (workspace tags, apply to cards)
tasks.doneWhen: Tag CRUD, apply/remove on card; workspace scoped; tests

tasks.title: IEmailService + MailKit SMTP implementation
tasks.doneWhen: Interface in Application; MailKit impl in Infrastructure; config via secrets

tasks.title: Async email via IHostedService + Channel
tasks.doneWhen: Non-blocking email queue; card assignment triggers email
tasks.notes: Original Sprint 6. Hangfire migration in Sprint 7.

tasks.title: CleanupExpiredRefreshTokensService (IHostedService)
tasks.doneWhen: Daily scan revokes expired refresh tokens

tasks.title: Integration tests — comments + tags
tasks.doneWhen: TestContainers tests for comment and tag workflows

tasks.title: Live Council — Sprint 6 review (bugs + security + architecture)
tasks.doneWhen: docs/council/sprint-6-report.md exists with prioritized findings and file:line refs
tasks.notes: Read-only review after s6-07. Findings fixed in s6-council-fixes; git push after s6-council-verify.

members.focus: Logic errors, edge cases, test gaps, consistency across layers.
OWASP API Top 10 2023, ASVS L2, JWT/refresh, RBAC, injection, secrets.
Clean Architecture boundaries, convention drift, scope creep.

synthesizer.focus: Merge, deduplicate, prioritize, list follow-up tasks for s6-council-fixes.

tasks.title: Fix Sprint 6 council security and bug findings
tasks.doneWhen: High/Medium findings from docs/council/sprint-6-report.md fixed or deferred with reason; dotnet test green
tasks.notes: Local only — git push waits for s6-council-verify.

tasks.title: Live Council — Sprint 6 remediation verification
tasks.doneWhen: docs/council/sprint-6-verify-report.md exists; High/Medium findings verified fixed or deferred; council signs off for publish
dontTouch: application code — report only unless blocker found
tasks.notes: Re-verification after s6-council-fixes. Agent-runner pushes full Sprint 6 work to GitHub when done.

members.focus: Re-check auth, RBAC, injection, secrets after remediation.
Confirm fixes match conventions; no scope creep.

synthesizer.focus: Sign off Sprint 6 for GitHub publish or list remaining blockers.

tasks.title: Sync docs — Sprint 6 delivered
tasks.doneWhen: Sprint 6 marked done; session log updated

tasks.title: Add Hangfire with SQL Server storage
tasks.doneWhen: Hangfire configured; dashboard at /jobs (admin policy)

tasks.title: Migrate email + token cleanup jobs to Hangfire
tasks.doneWhen: IHostedService email/cleanup replaced by Hangfire jobs with retry

tasks.title: ActivityLog entity + event-driven writes
tasks.doneWhen: Activity on card move, create, member invite; GetCardActivity query (Dapper)

tasks.title: Sync docs — Sprint 7 delivered
tasks.doneWhen: Sprint 7 marked done

tasks.title: Production docker-compose + secrets hardening
tasks.doneWhen: No public SQL/Redis ports; Production env; AllowedOrigins; Redis AUTH documented

tasks.title: Rate limiting on authenticated write endpoints
tasks.doneWhen: Per-user or per-IP policy on mutations; auth limit unchanged

tasks.title: CI — integration job parity + coverage report
tasks.doneWhen: CI documents Docker requirement; Coverlet/report optional

tasks.title: Deploy to Railway/Azure + live URL in README
tasks.doneWhen: Production deploy URL documented; compose prod variant

tasks.title: Sync docs — Sprint 8 / MVP complete
tasks.doneWhen: MVP marked complete; roadmap updated
